fault_hypothesis: The function never normalises the updated weights before returning; line 65 returns the raw interpolated values instead of dividing each weight by their total sum, so the output does not sum to 1.0 when inputs are not already normalised.

constraints.intent: The list being returned must already be normalised (sum to 1.0) before the return executes.
Every appended weight must be non-negative after each loop iteration.
After initialisation, updated__1 must be an empty list before the loop fills it.
The returned list must sum to 1.0 for any valid non-zero input.
